## 4. Audit Findings

## 5. Integration Best Practices

- **Fetch APIs:** Use Razorpay Fetch APIs for status reconciliation.
- **Webhooks:** Verify signatures on all webhook events.
- **Error Handling:** Ensure all error codes are properly consumed and mapped in user-friendly messages.
